title: Choose a Data Structure
description: Pick the right data structure for an access pattern.
content:
I need to store and access data like this: {{access_pattern}}

Recommend the data structure. Compare the 2-3 viable candidates on the operations I care about (insert, lookup, delete, iterate, ordered) with their Big-O. State the memory trade-off and which one wins for MY pattern. Flag the structure people reach for by habit that would be wrong here.

variables.name: access_pattern
variables.description: How the data is written and read
